hero.title: Your Journey to Global Education Starts Here
hero.subtitle: Expert guidance for university admissions, visas, and scholarships worldwide.

features.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
features.subtitle: From choosing the right program to arriving on campus, our platform and expert consultants guide you every step of the way.
features.universityDesc: AI-driven matching to find the perfect program based on your academic profile and career goals.
features.applicationDesc: Streamlined document collection, review, and direct submission to our partner institutions.
features.visaDesc: Expert guidance on visa applications with mock interviews and complete document checklists.

about.title: We Make Global Education
about.description: Founded in 2010, we have helped over 10,000 students from 50+ countries achieve their academic dreams. We're more than consultants — we're your partners in global success.
about.missionP1: We believe every motivated student deserves access to world-class education, regardless of their background. Our mission is to eliminate barriers and confusion from the international education journey.
about.missionP2: From your first inquiry to graduation day, we're with you every step — selecting the right university, crafting a compelling application, securing your visa, and settling into life abroad.
about.studentFirstDesc: Every decision we make centers on student success and wellbeing.
about.excellenceDesc: We maintain the highest standards in guidance and support.
about.innovationDesc: Using technology to streamline the application journey.
about.communityDesc: Building lifelong connections between students and institutions.
about.integrityDesc: Honest, transparent advice that puts students' interests first.
about.teamSubtitle: Expert consultants with decades of combined experience in international education.
about.ctaSubtitle: Book a free consultation with one of our expert advisors today.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Book a free consultation or ask us anything. Our advisors typically respond within 2 hours.

settingsPage.contractExpiryDesc: Set how many days before the agent contract's end date super admin, agency owner, and assigned office staff will be notified (in-app + email). Each threshold fires only once per contract. Comma-separated positive day counts (e.g.
settingsPage.signingDeadlineDesc: When a new agent is created, how many days should the auto-opened primary onboarding signing session remain valid? When it expires the agent sees a lock screen and an admin can resend it. (1–365 days, default 14)
settingsPage.invalidThresholdsDesc: Enter only positive integers separated by commas (e.g. 30,14,7,1).
settingsPage.rtlNote: RTL (right-to-left) is automatically applied for Arabic.

aiExtractor.title: AI Document Extractors
aiExtractor.subtitle: Manage the prompt, fields, model and provider used to extract data from uploaded documents. Add or remove fields, edit the prompt, swap the model — no code changes required.
aiExtractor.empty: No extractors yet. The built-in fallback is in use. Click "New Extractor" to create a custom one.
aiExtractor.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete extractor "{name}"?
aiExtractor.fDefault: Use as default (preferred over others within the same scope)
aiExtractor.systemPromptPlaceholder: You are an expert document analyzer…
aiExtractor.promptHint: Used when there is no localized prompt for the request language. Field schema and rules are appended automatically — describe role and tone here only.
aiExtractor.localizedPromptPlaceholder: Prompt for language: {lang}. Leave empty to use the base prompt.
aiExtractor.modelHint: Free-text — must match a model name supported by the provider (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6, gpt-4o, gemini-1.5-pro).
aiExtractor.rulesPlaceholder:
CRITICAL - Names: copy exactly as printed on the document.
Always normalize dates to YYYY-MM-DD.
Return ONLY a JSON object.
aiExtractor.rulesHint: These rules are appended to the prompt under a "Rules:" section.
aiExtractor.scopesHint: Where this extractor is allowed to run. If none selected, it will only be used when picked explicitly.
aiExtractor.testHint: Upload a sample image or PDF and run the extractor to see the live output. Test runs do not appear in history.
aiExtractor.testPrompt: Show prompt sent to the model
aiExtractor.providerNotWired: This provider is not yet wired into the runtime. Saving will work, but extractions will fail until engineering enables it. Use Anthropic for now.

exportImport.fileHint: Maximum file size 2 MB. Use the downloaded template so dropdowns and column headers match.
exportImport.conflict_overwrite_desc: replace every field of the existing record with the imported values.
exportImport.conflict_rename_desc: import with an auto-generated suffix so the original stays intact.
exportImport.errorTooLarge: File is larger than the 2 MB limit.

catalogPage.extensionsHint: Separate with commas, start with a dot: .pdf,.jpg,.png
catalogPage.degreeDocsHelp: Set documents to Optional or Mandatory to add them. Drag the handle or use the arrows to reorder — that order is exactly how the documents appear in the Add Student form.
catalogPage.docsForDegreeDesc: Select the documents required for this degree. Reorder by dragging or with the arrows.
catalogPage.noDocsAddedYet: No documents added yet. Add them from the list below using "+ Add".

notificationRules.prefNewLeadsDesc: Notify when a new lead is created or assigned
notificationRules.prefDocumentAlertsDesc: Notify when documents are uploaded or need review
notificationRules.prefFinanceAlertsDesc: Notify for new invoices and overdue payments
notificationRules.systemRulesDesc: Configure channels, toggle rules, and customize email templates for each event.
notificationRules.clickVariableHint: Click a variable to insert it into the body.
notificationRules.emailBodyPlaceholder: Write the email body content. Use {{variable}} for dynamic values.
notificationRules.automatedFooter: This is an automated notification from Find And Study OS.
notificationRules.htmlSupportedHint: Basic HTML is supported; line breaks are preserved for plain text.

subAgentsPage.emptyDesc: Add your first sub-agent to get started
subAgentsPage.createDesc: Create a new sub-agent under your agency. They can log in with their email and password.
subAgentsPage.passwordHelper: Set an initial password for login (can be changed later)
subAgentsPage.commissionHelper: Percentage of your commission to share with this sub-agent. E.g. if you receive 70% from the company and enter 50 here, the sub-agent gets 50% of your 70%.
subAgentsPage.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This will also remove their login account. This action cannot be undone.
subAgentsPage.nameRequired: First name and last name are required
subAgentsPage.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

teamPage.noStaffDesc: Add team members to help manage your agency
teamPage.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.
teamPage.permViewCommissionAmountDesc: Show commission amounts in Course Finder results.
teamPage.permViewServiceFeeDesc: Show service fee amounts in Course Finder results.
teamPage.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
teamPage.staffCreatedDesc: {name} has been added to your team.
teamPage.addStaffDescription: Create a new team member with specific permissions
teamPage.emailCannotChange: Email cannot be changed after creation

websiteForms.title: Forms
websiteForms.subtitle: Build and manage website forms with CRM integration.
websiteForms.noFormsDesc: Create your first form to collect submissions.
websiteForms.noFieldsYet: No fields yet. Add fields to build your form.
websiteForms.honeypotNote: A hidden honeypot field is automatically injected to prevent spam.
websiteForms.embedIntro: Use this endpoint to submit form data from your website:
websiteForms.honeypotEmbedAfter: field (leave empty) for honeypot spam protection.
websiteForms.crmSourceHelpBefore: Used as the lead source. Defaults to
websiteForms.pageSourceHelp: Identifies which page this form is embedded on for analytics/CRM tracking.
websiteForms.pipelineStageHelp: Pipeline stage where new leads from this form will be placed.
websiteForms.errorMessagePlaceholder: Shown to visitors if submission fails
websiteForms.successDefault: Thank you! Your submission has been received.
websiteForms.errorDefault: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

websiteTranslations.title: Translations
websiteTranslations.subtitle: Manage multilingual content for pages and blog posts.
websiteTranslations.defaultLocaleNoteAfter: . Click any page or post to translate its content into other languages. Configure supported languages in Settings > Language & Region.

branches.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to {action} the "{name}" branch?
branches.title: Branches
branches.subtitle: Create, edit and archive branches. Each branch has its own agents, students and applications.
branches.emptyActive: No branches yet. Create your first branch using the button above.

editStages.missingDocsHintPart1: A window opens to select the documents to request
editStages.missingDocsHintEmphasis: when the application reaches this stage
editStages.missingDocsHintPart2: . The selected documents are saved for this stage; the application cannot be moved to a later stage until the requests are completed.
editStages.docNamePlaceholderDownload: name of the document to download
editStages.docNameHintUpload: The uploaded file is saved with this name.
editStages.docNameHintDownload: The document matching this name is downloaded.
editStages.changeStageOnComplete: Change stage when the action is completed
editStages.financeCategoryHint: Won = definite commission/service fee. Partial Win = potential. None = excluded from finance.
editStages.countriesPlaceholder: e.g. Turkey, Germany, USA (separate with commas)
editStages.countriesHint: Fill in this field only if it applies to specific countries.
editStages.canGoBack: Can it go back to the previous stage?
editStages.uploadPermissionHint: Who can upload documents at this stage. If "None" is selected, the stage does not appear in the documents panel.
editStages.tracksOfferExpiry: Should the offer deadline be tracked?
editStages.autoCancelSiblings: Should other applications be automatically cancelled when reaching this stage?
editStages.missingDocsFulfilledTarget: Stage to move to when missing documents are completed
editStages.missingDocsFulfilledHint: When all catalog-based missing document requests at this stage are fulfilled by the student, the application automatically moves to the selected stage. Custom (free-text) requests are not included in this calculation.
editStages.financeAssignmentDesc: When this stage is reached, the finance status for commission and service fee is assigned automatically.
editStages.stageActionsDesc: Up to 2 buttons appear in the Applications list for applications at this stage. When a button is completed, the application moves to the selected target stage.
editStages.atLeastOneStage: At least one stage is required
editStages.keyReadonlyTitle: Key cannot be changed for existing stages
editStages.studentMappingTitle: When the application reaches this stage, the linked student's status is set to this value

errorBoundary.title: Page could not be loaded
errorBoundary.desc: This may be caused by a network issue or a recent update. Please reload.

setPassword.errorMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
setPassword.errorUppercase: Password must contain an uppercase letter.
setPassword.title: Set Your Password
setPassword.subtitle: Set Your Password
setPassword.emailVerifiedDesc: Set a password to continue. In the next step you will sign your contract.

signedContract.pdfPending: PDF is still being generated. Please try again in about 30 seconds.
signedContract.regenerateQueued: Regenerating the PDF; it will be ready to download in about 30 seconds.

apiTokens.title: API Tokens
apiTokens.description: Create and manage personal access tokens to use the API programmatically. Treat tokens like passwords.
apiTokens.empty: You have no API tokens yet.
apiTokens.revokeConfirmBody: "{name}" will stop working immediately. Any integration using it will lose access. This cannot be undone.
apiTokens.createDescription: Give the token a name and choose what it can access.
apiTokens.scopesRequired: Please select at least one scope.
apiTokens.createdWarning: Copy your token now. For security, it will not be shown again.
